live_message: Anthony Russo is on a call right now. The agent is qualifying him — pre-approved $480K, three-bed in West End, wants showings this weekend.
live_message_es: Anthony Russo está en una llamada ahora mismo. El agente lo está calificando — preaprobado a $480K, casa de tres habitaciones en West End, quiere visitas este fin de semana.

calls.name: Anthony Russo
calls.summary: Currently on call — buyer consult, pre-approved

transcript.text: Cohen and Reyes Realty, how can I help?
Hi, I'm pre-approved up to four-eighty and looking in the West End.
Great — pre-approval means you're ready to move. May I have your name?
Anthony Russo.
Anthony, what's most important — number of bedrooms, school district, anything specific?
Three bedrooms minimum, good schools, fenced yard for the dog.
Got it. I can have one of our agents pull a list this afternoon and book a Saturday showing tour. Which agent is best — we have Maria, who specializes in West End, or Tom?
Whichever knows West End best.
Maria, then. Saturday 2:00 PM tour, three to four homes, about two hours. Sound good?

calls.summary_long: Anthony Russo — pre-approved buyer to $480K, looking West End, 3+ beds, fenced yard, good schools. Routed to agent Maria (West End specialist). Discussing Saturday 2:00 PM showing tour (3-4 homes, ~2 hrs). Call in progress.

calls.name: Anonymous caller
calls.summary: Asked about a listing on Hamilton St (info sent)

calls.name: Olivia Bennett
calls.summary: Booked Saturday 11:00 AM — showing tour (3 homes)

transcript.text: Cohen and Reyes Realty.
Hi, I saved three homes on Zillow and want to see them in person.
Of course. Are you working with an agent already?
No.
Okay, I can have one of ours meet you. Are you pre-approved or paying cash?
Pre-approved, three-fifty.
Perfect. Send me the three Zillow links by text and I'll have Tom pull the listings and schedule the tour. Saturday 11:00 AM work?
Yes.
Booked. Saturday 11:00 AM tour with Tom. He'll text you Friday to confirm the home order and meeting spot.

calls.summary_long: Olivia Bennett — unrepresented buyer, pre-approved $350K, identified 3 Zillow listings. Routed to agent Tom. Saturday 11:00 AM showing tour booked. Asked her to text the 3 Zillow links for Tom to pull listings + sequence the tour.

calls.name: Steven Park

transcript.text: Cohen and Reyes Realty.
I'm thinking about selling my house. Want to find out what it's worth.
Sure. We do a free in-home valuation — CMA. May I have your name and the address?
Steven Park, twenty-six Linden Drive.
Got it. Three-bed, two-bath, fifteen sixty square feet, right?
That's it.
I'll send Maria — she sold two homes on Linden last year. Thursday 5:00 PM for the in-home? About an hour.
Works.
Booked. Maria will text you Wednesday with a quick pre-visit questionnaire — five questions — so she comes prepared with comps.

calls.summary_long: Steven Park, 26 Linden Drive (3/2, 1560 sq ft), considering selling. Routed to Maria (recently closed two homes on same street). Booked Thursday 5:00 PM in-home CMA (60m). Pre-visit questionnaire auto-scheduled for Wednesday.

calls.summary: Asked if you cover Bethlehem (yes — booking link sent)
